name: Ashland Inc.
lede: Ashland runs three centers across two Indian cities. Hyderabad and Mumbai, covering GBS, R&D and CoE, built over fourteen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Ashland office in India. We map three, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Ashland Inc. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Ashland runs 3 verified centers across 2 Indian cities (Hyderabad, Mumbai), covering GBS, R&D and CoE. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

titles.title: Head Sourcing - Asia Pacific ( excluding China ) at Ashland Inc

about.description: Ashland's India footprint covers Hyderabad and Mumbai, spanning GBS, R&D and CoE. The centers deliver R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting, HR and Procurement for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all seven decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many centers does Ashland operate in India?
faq.a: Ashland operates 3 active centers in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Ashland have centers in?
faq.a: Ashland's India footprint includes Hyderabad and 1 additional cities.

faq.q: What types of centers does Ashland run in India?
faq.a: Ashland runs GBS and 2 additional center types centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Ashland's India centers?
faq.a: Aggregate and center-level headcount for Ashland's India operations is available in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Ashland's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks leaders at Ashland's India centers, across Finance and other leadership functions. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
